name: cyberos
description: Turn an idea, PRD, or spec into audited tasks, then ship them under a governed workflow. /create-tasks drafts tasks and audits them into the backlog; /ship-tasks drives each one through implement -> review -> test -> done, with the human holding the two acceptance gates. /install installs the machine into any repo; /version, /status, /uninstall and /help keep it current. Agents never push, merge, deploy, or self-accept.
